narrative:
Sycamore Twp. township has 14,397 registered voters, with 55.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 27.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.5%, a clear Republican lean of 9.7 percentage points.
